note: All images in this set have WHITE/TRANSPARENT backgrounds they are cut-out (PNG-style) assets, NOT full-bleed photography. This is a critical design constraint: these images are compositing elements, not standalone backgrounds. They must be layered OVER background colors, gradients, videos or other full-bleed photos.

images.subject: Istanbul Şehir Hatları Ferry – ŞH Beyoğlu
images.description: Cut-out portrait of an Istanbul commuter ferry (Şehir Hatları vapur) named 'ŞH Beyoğlu', shot from the bow at a slight angle. Three passenger decks visible. Passengers standing on upper open deck, Turkish flag (kırmızı-beyaz) flying from mid-ship. Orange safety rings (can simitleri) visible on railings of all decks. Orange mast. Seagulls (martı) visible in background near mast. Hull is white with dark green at waterline. The vessel is positioned left-of-center, leaving significant white space to the right and below.

composition.subject_position: left-center, occupying roughly top-left quadrant
composition.white_space: large right half and bottom third are empty
composition.framing: bow-forward angle, slightly from below

images.mood: iconic, maritime, daily Istanbul life, movement, freedom
images.suggested_use: Compositing element float over Bosphorus video/photo background. The vessel can drift across the Hero section from right to left (translateX animation) as if crossing the strait.

animation_hints.primary: translateX from right edge to left edge, slow drift 8-12s loop, ease-in-out
animation_hints.secondary: subtle vertical sine wave (±5px) to simulate water movement
animation_hints.parallax: move at 0.6x scroll speed relative to background (creates depth)
animation_hints.entry: fade-in from opacity 0 as user scrolls into Hero section
animation_hints.reduced_motion_fallback: static placement, opacity fade-in only

images.design_notes: White background means this MUST be placed over a non-white layer. Works beautifully over ESN Cyan (#00a6ef) Bosphorus color or a dark navy background. Do NOT use on white page sections.

images.subject: Pink Tulip Bouquet (Pembe Lale Demeti)
images.description: Cut-out of a lush bouquet of pink-magenta double-petaled tulips with green stems and leaves. Roughly 15-20 tulip heads visible, tightly grouped, some in full bloom, some still closed/budding. Colors range from deep magenta-pink at edges to lighter pink-white at center petals. No outdoor context purely the flowers isolated on white.

composition.subject_position: bottom-center, blooms fill lower 60% of frame
composition.white_space: upper 40% is empty white
composition.framing: close-up bouquet shot, slightly from above

images.mood: vibrant, celebratory, spring, Ottoman heritage, feminine energy, festival
images.color_match_esn: The magenta-pink is very close to ESN Magenta (#ec008c) strong brand harmony. Use intentionally.
images.suggested_use: Decorative compositing element. Can bloom upward from the bottom of a section (translateY from below). Works as a section divider element or a floating accent near Discovery map pins.

animation_hints.entry: translateY from +80px to 0, opacity 0 to 1, duration 0.8s ease-out, triggered on scroll
animation_hints.secondary: very subtle sway: rotate(-1deg) to rotate(1deg) on infinite loop, 4s ease-in-out
animation_hints.stagger: if using multiple lale images together, stagger entry by 150ms per flower group
animation_hints.reduced_motion_fallback: static placement, opacity fade-in only

images.design_notes: Pink-magenta color naturally harmonizes with ESN Magenta. On dark backgrounds (ESN Dark Blue #2e3192 or black), the green stems will also pop. Avoid placing on white backgrounds the cutout will be invisible.

images.subject: Istanbul Seagull in Flight (Uçan Martı)
images.description: Cut-out of a single seagull photographed mid-flight from slightly below, wings fully spread upward in a V-shape glide posture. Bird faces slightly left (toward viewer's left). White-grey plumage on body and inner wings, dark grey-black wingtips and primary feathers. Legs tucked under body, beak slightly open. Very clean isolation ideal for compositing. This is the HIGHEST QUALITY cut-out asset in the set near-perfect edge isolation.

composition.subject_position: centered, fills roughly 70% of frame
composition.white_space: corners are empty, bird fills the visual center
composition.framing: from slightly below, wings spread wide dramatic, expansive feeling
composition.flight_direction: bird appears to be gliding/banking left

images.mood: freedom, soaring, Istanbul spirit, maritime, poetic, iconic, alive
images.suggested_use: STAR ASSET for Hero section. Layer over Bosphorus background video/image. Multiple seagulls (marti-1 + marti-2) at different scales create parallax depth larger one in foreground moves faster, smaller one in background moves slower.

animation_hints.primary: translateX drift from right to left at different speed than ferry creates layered depth
animation_hints.wing_flap: subtle CSS scale on Y axis (scaleY 1 to 0.92 to 1, 1.2s loop) to simulate slow wing movement
animation_hints.vertical: sine wave vertical drift ±8px, 3s loop, offset timing from ferry animation
animation_hints.parallax_depth: use at 0.4x scroll speed for foreground seagull, 0.25x for background (if using marti-1 together)

animation_hints.reduced_motion_fallback: static placement at upper-right quadrant of Hero, opacity 80%

images.subject: Turkish Coffee Being Poured (Türk Kahvesi Dökülüyor)
images.description: Cut-out of Turkish coffee being poured from a copper cezve (ibrik) into a traditional Iznik-pattern porcelain demitasse cup on a matching saucer. The pour is active dark brown coffee stream visible mid-air from cezve spout into cup. The cup and saucer feature hand-painted blue, red and green floral Ottoman motifs (carnations, tulips, leaves) on white porcelain classic Kütahya/Iznik style. The cezve (top-left) is partially cut off. Slight reflective sheen on saucer surface.

composition.subject_position: center-bottom, cup dominates lower 70%, cezve enters from top-left
composition.white_space: top-right corner empty, right side has some breathing room
composition.framing: close-up, slightly from above and to the right, 3/4 angle

images.mood: ritual, warmth, Ottoman culture, artisanal, hospitality, sensory, rich
images.design_connection: The Iznik floral motifs on the cup DIRECTLY ECHO the cini-yatay.webp (İznik tile) image these two assets pair perfectly together for a 'Ottoman art in daily life' narrative moment.
images.suggested_use: Float over a warm-toned background section. The active pour moment makes it feel alive use as a 'cultural experience' pin reveal or as a lifestyle card in the Reality section.

animation_hints.entry: translateY from +40px to 0, opacity 0 to 1, duration 0.7s ease-out on scroll trigger
animation_hints.pour_effect: if desired, add a dark-brown particle/drip CSS animation falling from cezve spout position to cup (pure CSS, no JS needed)
animation_hints.steam: add 2-3 SVG/CSS wavy lines rising from cup top opacity 0.4, slow wave animation, ESN Orange tinted
animation_hints.hover: on desktop hover: scale(1.03) with drop-shadow increase, 0.3s ease
animation_hints.reduced_motion_fallback: static placement, opacity fade-in only, no steam or pour effects

images.design_notes: The cup's Iznik motifs (blue, red, green) create a natural color bridge between ESN Dark Blue (#2e3192) and the Ottoman heritage visual language of the site. Pair with cini-yatay.webp for visual consistency. Like all assets in this set: do NOT place on white backgrounds.

images.subject: Akaretler Row Houses at Sunset
images.description: A vertical street-level shot of the historic Akaretler Row Houses in Beşiktaş during golden hour. The cobblestone road in the foreground reflects the warm glow of street lamps and the setting sun. Neoclassical buildings with ornate balconies line the left side, illuminated by architectural lighting, while cars with glowing headlights are parked or moving slowly. A Christmas tree and street decorations are visible in the distance under a vibrant teal and pink sunset sky.

composition.white_space: none - full frame
composition.framing: low-angle wide shot emphasizing the cobblestone texture and building height

images.esn_color_match: ESN Orange (#f47b20) matches the historical energy and warm sunset/lighting tones
images.design_connection: balat-dikey.jpg both provide vertical urban texture for student lifestyle sections
images.suggested_use: Use as a full-bleed background for the 'Day vs Night' student lifestyle comparison. The warm lighting makes it perfect for the 'Evening' side of the split-screen.

images.subject: Blue Mosque (Sultan Ahmed Mosque) with Birds
images.description: A clean cutout of the Sultan Ahmed Mosque (often mistaken for Hagia Sophia in filenames) at twilight. The mosque is viewed from the courtyard with its six minarets and central domes creating a symmetrical silhouette. A flock of small black birds is scattered across the top-left sky area. The wet courtyard floor in the foreground shows a vivid orange and gold reflection of the building's evening lights.

composition.framing: centered architectural symmetry with a low-angle reflection

images.mood: majestic, spiritual, peaceful, historical, iconic
images.esn_color_match: ESN Orange (#f47b20) harmonizes with the golden reflections and historical significance
images.design_connection: boga-heykeli.webp both represent iconic physical landmarks of Istanbul's identity
images.suggested_use: Place in the 'Pride' section as a primary visual anchor. Layer over a subtle dark blue gradient to make the golden reflections pop.

animation_hints.entry: opacity 0, translateY(30px), 1s duration, ease-out

images.subject: Colorful Bay Windows of Balat
images.description: A close-up vertical shot of the iconic colorful bay windows (cumba) in the Balat district. The buildings are painted in vibrant shades of orange, bright cyan, brown, and pink. Wrought iron security grilles are visible on lower windows, and messy electrical wires cross the frame, adding to the authentic urban feel. Sharp sunlight creates high-contrast shadows on the building facades.

composition.white_space: none
composition.framing: extreme upward angle, looking down the street line

images.mood: vibrant, authentic, artistic, local, energetic, textured
images.esn_color_match: ESN Green (#7ac143) pairs with the 'Student Life' theme and provides a complementary pop to the existing warm/cool building tones
images.design_connection: balat-yatay.jpg use both to establish the Balat aesthetic in different layout containers
images.suggested_use: Use as a card background or a vertical 'sliver' in a multi-column layout to represent local culture and neighborhood discovery.

images.description: A horizontal cutout showing a row of five historic, multi-story houses in Balat. The houses are painted in distinct colors: navy/green, red, bright blue, yellow, and light green. The buildings sit on a sloping cobblestone street. The background has been removed to black/white, leaving only the structural row of houses and the street in front.

images.design_connection: balat-dikey.jpg same location, different perspective for variety

images.subject: The Bull Statue of Kadıköy (Boğa Heykeli)
images.description: A clean cutout of the famous bronze Bull Statue located in Kadıköy, Istanbul. The bull is in a powerful, charging pose with its head lowered and one front leg slightly raised. It stands on a dark, textured bronze base. The lighting is bright and directional, highlighting the muscular anatomy and metallic texture of the bronze. The entire background is white.

images.subject: Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridge at Sunset
images.description: An elevated, high-angle view of the Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridge spanning the Bosphorus. The sky is a dramatic gradient of fiery red, orange, and yellow at the horizon, transitioning into soft purple clouds. The bridge is illuminated with red lights on its towers and white lights along its cables. In the foreground, a large Turkish flag on a tall white pole waves prominently. The city skyline and Maslak business district are visible in the far distance under the sunset.

composition.white_space: none - full bleed
composition.framing: aerial perspective from a high vantage point (likely Otağtepe Park)

images.esn_color_match: ESN Orange (#f47b20) perfectly mirrors the natural sunset and the bridge's red lighting
images.design_connection: bogaz-koprusu-2.webp use both to show the bridge in different light states (sunset vs. deep night)
images.suggested_use: Primary background image for the Hero section. The diagonal line of the bridge guides the user's eye toward the CTA button or headline placed in the top-left quadrant.

images.subject: 15 July Martyrs Bridge (Bosphorus Bridge) at Night
images.description: A horizontal night-time view of the first Bosphorus Bridge. The bridge towers are lit in a vibrant, glowing red, and car headlights create a continuous white/yellow streak across the span. The city lights twinkle in the background against a dark, cloudy twilight sky. The image is framed within a wide letterbox format with significant white space above and below the central landscape band.

images.subject: Turkish Tea in Traditional Glass with Ornamented Spoon
images.description: A high-angle, slightly isometric view of a traditional 'ince belli' (slim-waisted) Turkish tea glass filled with deep amber-red tea. The glass sits on a white porcelain saucer decorated with classic red-teardrop patterns. A gold-colored spoon with an intricate, filigree-style handle rests inside the glass. The cutout is clean with soft shadows at the base of the saucer.

It sits in a textured, bronze-colored saucer with carved, organic patterns. The lighting is low and dramatic, making the tea appear like liquid mahogany. The glass has a clear reflection on the metallic surface of the saucer.

images.subject: Iznik Tile Panel Ottoman Floral Wall
images.description: A large rectangular panel of classical Iznik-style ceramic tiles arranged in a grid, photographed head-on from a flat frontal angle. The central field is white, densely covered with repeating Ottoman floral motifs: stylized tulips, carnations, hyacinths, saz leaves, and rosettes rendered in cobalt blue, turquoise, and crimson red on white glaze. Both left and right vertical borders are solid cobalt blue with scrolling white arabesques and red accent florals. The tile grid lines are faintly visible. The panel fills nearly the entire frame with minimal white overshoot at edges.

composition.subject_position: centered, fills 95%+ of frame
composition.white_space: minimal thin slivers at all four edges only
composition.framing: flat frontal, no perspective distortion, full-panel shot

images.mood: ornate, historic, intricate, cultural, timeless, imperial
images.esn_color_match: ESN Cyan (#00a6ef) and ESN Dark Blue (#2e3192) the cobalt and turquoise tones of the tiles directly echo both ESN blues, making this asset feel brand-native when placed against dark blue or cyan section backgrounds

Alternatively, crop a quadrant and use as a decorative side panel or parallax texture strip behind text overlays. Do not use as a floating cutout its strength is as a surface texture.

animation_hints.entry: opacity 0 to 1 with subtle scale 1.05 to 1.0, duration 1s ease-out, triggered at Intersection Observer threshold 0.25

animation_hints.secondary: null

Because the background is white glaze (not transparent), apply mix-blend-mode: multiply only if layering over a non-white background; otherwise mask the border region and use as a texture tile.

images.subject: Istanbul Ferry Bow and Port Side View
images.description: A classic Istanbul Şehir Hatları commuter ferry photographed from water level at a slight left-to-right angle, showing the bow and full port side. The hull is white with a distinctive horizontal gold/amber stripe. The funnel is bright amber-yellow with a black top and bears a red decorative emblem (anchor or maritime insignia). Orange life rings are mounted along the upper passenger deck railing. Passengers are visible seated on the lower open deck, right side. In the background upper-left, the historic Haydarpaşa Train Station building with its twin turrets is partially visible. The ferry occupies approximately 75% of the frame, positioned center-to-right. Large white space at top; water (muted teal-grey) fills the bottom third.

composition.subject_position: center-right, bow pointing lower-left
composition.white_space: large empty white area top-left (sky replaced), moderate white at far right
composition.framing: near water level, slight upward angle, medium distance boat fills vertical height of frame

images.esn_color_match: ESN Orange (#f47b20) the ferry's amber-gold stripe and funnel are near-identical to ESN Orange, creating instant brand harmony when placed over ESN Dark Blue or cyan section backgrounds
images.design_connection: feribot-yatay.webp both show Istanbul ferries; use together at different scales to create a multi-layer Bosphorus scene with depth, or use one for Hero and one for Discovery

The bow facing left creates natural leftward movement energy pair with right-to-left drift animation to feel like the ferry is crossing the frame. The tall portrait format suits a right-anchored CSS absolute position.

Water at the bottom is photographic and will show seam edges if placed over a solid color crop or feather the bottom 15% for seamless compositing.

images.subject: Istanbul Ferry 'Tuat Sezgin' Crossing the Golden Horn Full Scene
images.description: A crowded Istanbul commuter ferry named 'TUAT SEZGİN' (name visible on the bow in black lettering) photographed from water level at a near-frontal angle, slightly starboard side. The ferry is packed with passengers on both the enclosed lower deck and the open upper deck; dozens of people lean on railings, stand, and sit. A prominent Turkish flag (red with white crescent and star) flies from a tall pole at the bow's upper-left. A row of six orange life-ring buoys lines the upper deck railing. The ferry's hull is white with a horizontal amber-gold stripe. In the background left, the Galata Tower and the Galata Bridge are partially visible against a white sky. A second ferry is visible far left background. Wake foam is visible at the lower-left. The scene fills approximately 85% of the frame; white sky fills the top 15%.

colors.secondary: crimson red (#cc1010) Turkish flag and life rings

composition.white_space: top 15% white sky, small white margin at far left and right
composition.framing: water-level, near-frontal with slight starboard angle, medium-close distance ferry fills vertical frame

images.design_connection: feribot-dikey-2.webp both are Istanbul ferry cutouts; use feribot-yatay as the wide establishing scene (Discovery or Hero) and feribot-dikey-2 as a close detail layer to create compositional depth within the same section

images.subject: İslak Hamburger Istanbul Wet Burger Pair
images.description: Two classic Istanbul street-food 'ıslak hamburger' (wet burgers) photographed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle, presented side by side. Each burger sits in a translucent greaseproof paper wrapper, partially open at the top. The buns are deeply glazed with a tomato-paprika sauce that gives them a characteristic glossy, orange-amber appearance with dark caramelized patches on top. Dark, thin grilled beef patties are visible peeking out from the base of each bun. The left burger is slightly smaller and positioned slightly behind the right one. The pair occupies approximately 50% of the frame, centered horizontally and sitting in the lower-center of the image. Generous white space above and on all sides.

images.subject: Galata Tower at Dusk with Beyoğlu Rooftops
images.description: The Galata Tower photographed at dusk or early evening from a medium-distance elevated vantage point, showing the full tower from its conical slate-grey roof and iron spire down to the cylindrical stone body with arched windows and a viewing balcony. The tower's medieval limestone surface shows warm reddish-amber internal lighting glowing through the arched balcony openings. Behind and below the tower stretches a dense cluster of Beyoğlu rooftops with terracotta-red roof tiles and low-rise apartment buildings. In the distant background, faintly visible through haze, is a mosque dome and a minaret silhouette on the opposite hillside. The entire composition tower plus rooftop neighborhood fills the bottom 75% of the frame. The top 25% is flat white (sky removed). No text visible.

images.subject: Istanbul Street Cat Tabby and White, Sitting, Looking Up
images.description: A medium-longhaired tabby-and-white street cat sits upright on a flat surface, body facing slightly left while the head is turned further left and tilted upward at approximately 30 degrees, as if watching something above and to the left. The coat is a classic brown-grey mackerel tabby pattern on the back, sides, and head, with a broad white bib covering the chest and belly. The face shows clear tabby striping on the forehead, a white muzzle, and a small pink nose. Both eyes are open and alert left eye fully visible, right eye partially obscured by the head turn. White whiskers extend prominently. The cat occupies approximately 60% of the frame, centered horizontally, with its base sitting at roughly the lower 15% of the image. Large empty white space fills the upper 30% of the frame.

images.subject: Maiden's Tower (Kız Kulesi) Daytime, Frontal View with Visitors
images.description: The Maiden's Tower (Kız Kulesi) photographed from water level at a straight frontal angle in overcast daylight, showing the complete structure from flagpole tip to waterline. The tower consists of a lower two-storey annexe building with cream-rendered walls, terracotta-red tiled roof, arched windows with brown wooden shutters, and a covered entrance portico. Above it rises the main stone tower body with irregular coursed limestone, decorative iron cross-bracing bands, and a wrought-iron viewing balcony. The upper section transitions to a whitewashed lantern room topped by a dark oxidized copper dome with an ornate metal crown. A tall flagpole with a red Turkish flag flies from the apex. A small group of approximately 15 visitors is visible on the stone landing pier at the base. The complete structure fills approximately 80% of the frame height, centered. Large white space occupies the top 15% (sky removed) and narrow margins at left and right. The Bosphorus water (pale grey-blue) occupies the bottom 8% of the frame.

images.subject: Maiden's Tower (Kız Kulesi) Golden Sunset with Seagulls
images.description: The Maiden's Tower photographed at golden hour sunset from a straight frontal water-level angle. The entire scene is bathed in a deep warm amber-terracotta glow that saturates the tower walls, the Bosphorus water, and the distant Asian shore. The tower structure is identical to kiz-kulesi-1.webp but rendered in warm sepia-amber tones: cream walls are now burnt orange, the stone body glows in tawny amber, and the dome is a deep charcoal-brown. A red Turkish flag on the flagpole is visible at the apex. A small orange-and-white lighthouse marker structure is visible to the right of the tower. The stone pier at the base is partially visible with tiny human silhouettes. Approximately 10–12 seagulls are in flight around the tower at various heights and positions, scattered across the upper two-thirds of the image some close and large, others small and distant. The Bosphorus foreground water reflects the amber sunset in rippled warm-toned horizontals. On the distant left horizon, a hazy shoreline with a mosque silhouette and minaret is faintly visible. The sky has been removed and replaced with white, occupying the top 15% of the frame. The total composition fills approximately 85% of the frame.

images.subject: Istanbul Seagull Standing, Side Profile (Martı)
images.description: A large adult seagull stands upright on a flat surface, photographed from a perfectly lateral left-facing side profile at eye level. The body posture is alert and dignified chest forward, neck slightly extended, head turned cleanly to the left. The plumage is sharply bicolored: bright white on the head, neck, breast, and belly; dark charcoal-grey to dark brown-black on the folded wings and back. The beak is bright amber-yellow with a small red-orange spot near the tip and a black subterminal band a classic large gull beak. The eye is golden-yellow with a dark pupil, set in an expressionless alert gaze. Both legs are visible and fully extended, amber-yellow with webbed feet spread on the ground. The tail feathers are white with dark edging. The bird occupies approximately 55% of the frame, positioned center to slightly right. Generous white space surrounds all sides, particularly above the head and below the feet.

images.subject: Iznik Tile Panel Framed Ottoman Floral Composition with Border
images.description: A rectangular decorative tile panel rendered in Iznik ceramic style, photographed or digitally reproduced at a flat frontal angle. The panel has a clear three-zone structure: an outer border of cobalt blue with dense white arabesque scrollwork and green floral accent motifs at corners and intervals; a narrow inner turquoise-blue linear border; and a central white field densely filled with a symmetrical vertical Ottoman floral design. The central motif consists of a continuous vertical axis of tulips (red, elongated needle-shape), carnations (red, fringed), stylized blue hyacinths and rosettes, and large dark-cobalt saz leaves, all rendered in cobalt blue, turquoise, red, and olive green on white glaze. The panel is displayed slightly off-white at the very edges of the frame, suggesting it is set into a wall or display mount. Hairline tile grid lines are barely visible. The panel fills approximately 90% of the frame.

images.subject: Iznik Tile Corner Motif Digital Illustration with Tulips and Carnations
images.description: A digitally illustrated square Iznik-style tile composition designed as a corner or quarter-panel motif. The upper-left quadrant features five elongated red tulips with olive-green stems fanning outward diagonally from a central root, rendered in flat graphic style with white highlight lines. Scattered between the tulips are small cyan teardrop buds. The lower-right quadrant contains a large stylized leaf or medallion shape in turquoise, filled with cobalt blue arabesque scrollwork with white detail lines. At the center of the composition, a cluster of red carnations (dianthus) with green stems emerges from the meeting point of the two quadrants, surrounded by turquoise accent buds. Small cyan circular berry clusters are scattered in the upper-left white field. The overall style is clean, vector-like digital illustration rather than a photographic tile reproduction. The composition fills nearly the full square frame with minimal white margin.

images.subject: Simit Top-Down View in Kraft Paper Bag
images.description: A single simit (Istanbul sesame bread ring) photographed from directly above in a top-down flat-lay perspective, resting inside an open kraft paper bag printed with English-language text in a decorative editorial font. Visible text fragments on the bag include 'VOL NO. 30', 'dough', 'chocolate chip', 'cookies', 'straightforward', 'amazingly', 'ingredients', and partial sentences about baking suggesting a repurposed artisan food packaging bag. The simit is a perfect toroidal ring of braided bread, golden-brown with deep caramelized patches, entirely encrusted with densely packed toasted sesame seeds that give it a textured amber-brown surface. The hole at the center of the simit is visible and shows the interior of the kraft bag beneath. The simit and its open bag fill approximately 70% of the frame, positioned center to slightly upper-center. White space is visible in all four corners and the lower portion of the frame.

Pair with a price callout graphic (e.g. '₺10') placed inside the simit hole for an editorial cost-of-living infographic moment.

images.subject: Simit Stack Four Simits on Newspaper Wrapping
images.description: Four simit (Istanbul sesame bread rings) stacked vertically in a neat tower, photographed from a slightly elevated three-quarter front angle. Each simit is a twisted-rope braided dough ring generously coated in toasted sesame seeds, baked to a rich golden-chestnut brown with lighter pale cream inner curves where the sesame coverage is thinner. The four rings decrease slightly in diameter from bottom to top, giving the stack a slightly tapered profile. The bottom simit rests on a crumpled sheet of grey-white newspaper-print wrapping paper with black Latin-alphabet text visible. The stack fills approximately 65% of the frame, centered horizontally, sitting in the center-to-lower portion. White space is visible above (top 25%) and moderately on both sides.

images.subject: Taksim–Tünel Historic Red Tram No. 410
images.description: A classic Istanbul heritage tram photographed from a slightly elevated three-quarter front-left angle, showing the full vehicle from pantograph arm to undercarriage. The tram is vivid crimson-red with cream-white trim lines along the roofline and body panels. The wooden-framed passenger windows along the side are dark walnut brown. The destination board above the front windshield reads 'TAKSİM – TÜNEL' in white text on a red background, with a red circular number plate showing '3' above it. The front fascia bears the unit number '410' in white on both the left panel and right corner, and two smaller lines of text: 'ASILLIK YASAK' and 'DBTHLH UMELİDER' in white. A single circular headlamp with a cream surround is mounted centrally on the nose. The overhead pantograph arm (oval loop shape) is visible above the roofline. The tram fills approximately 80% of the frame, positioned center to slightly right, with the nose pointing toward the lower-left.

images.subject: Turkish Coffee Top-Down View in Cobalt Blue Ottoman Cup and Saucer
images.description: A small Turkish coffee cup and saucer photographed from directly overhead in a flat-lay perspective. The cup is a traditional demitasse shape with a single gold handle visible at the right side. It is filled to near the rim with dark Turkish coffee topped by a dense tan-brown foam with fine dark espresso bubbles scattered across the surface. The cup exterior and saucer are decorated in a rich cobalt blue glaze with an intricate Ottoman floral pattern of red carnations, green leaves, and gold vine tendrils on a deep royal blue (#1a3ab0) ground, framed by a continuous gilded gold rim on both cup and saucer. The circular saucer occupies approximately 70% of the frame, centered. The cup sits slightly off-center to the upper-left within the saucer. Generous white space fills the top 20% and side margins of the frame.

images.subject: Basilica Cistern (Yerebatan Sarnıcı) Wide Symmetrical Interior, Amber Lighting
images.description: A wide-angle interior photograph of the Basilica Cistern (Yerebatan Sarnıcı) in Istanbul, shot from ground level at the central aisle looking directly down the main axis toward a vanishing point. The composition is nearly perfectly symmetrical: two parallel rows of massive Roman columns with Corinthian-style capitals extend from foreground to background, flanking a flooded central aisle. The ceiling is a continuous series of Byzantine brick barrel vaults illuminated by warm amber-gold uplighting, creating a dramatic chiaroscuro effect of glowing arches against shadowed interstices. Each column base is lit by individual amber spotlights reflecting in the still dark water below, creating doubled luminous columns in the reflections. The overall palette is a rich amber-gold (#c87010) with deep chestnut-brown (#3a1808) shadows and flecks of crimson red (#9a1010) from colored accent lights on several columns in the mid-ground. The far end of the cistern is barely visible as a warm rectangle of distant light. A modern wooden walkway platform is faintly visible along the right colonnade. The scene fills the full frame no white space.

The perfect central symmetry creates a natural center channel for headline text overlay. Apply a dark semi-transparent gradient overlay (dark navy to transparent) on the left third for legible text placement. This image alone can carry an entire scroll section as the background.

images.design_notes: This is a full-bleed real-scene photograph with no cutout handling needed. The perfect symmetry means the image can be center-cropped at any aspect ratio without losing compositional integrity. The amber tones are warm enough that white text will need a semi-transparent dark overlay for legibility recommend a CSS background: linear-gradient overlay at 40–55% opacity in ESN Dark Blue (#2e3192) or black. Do not apply mix-blend-mode. The image is relatively low resolution for a full-bleed background CSS filter: blur(0.3px) can soften any compression artifacts at large viewport sizes.

images.subject: Basilica Cistern (Yerebatan Sarnıcı) Tall Immersive Interior, Orange and Teal Lighting
images.description: A tall portrait interior photograph of the Basilica Cistern ,shot from ground level looking diagonally down the colonnade from a slightly off-center left position, creating a dramatic asymmetric perspective. The upper two-thirds of the frame is dominated by the vaulted brick ceiling lit in a vivid fiery orange-red (#d04010), so intense it borders on infrared in tone the herringbone brickwork of the barrel vaults is rendered in extraordinary textural detail by the raking light. Two rows of tall Roman columns recede toward a vanishing point; those in the foreground are large and close, those in the background diminish rapidly. A striking color contrast defines the lower third: the floor and walkway are bathed in an electric turquoise-cyan (#00c8c0) from LED ground uplighting, reflecting on the wet floor surface as luminous pools. Small warm amber spotlights at column bases glow amber-orange against the cyan ground. Visitors are faintly visible as dark silhouettes in the mid-ground. The full frame is filled no white space.

images.subject: Turkish Coffee Three-Quarter View in Iznik White Floral Cup and Saucer
images.description: A traditional Turkish coffee cup and saucer photographed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle, showing both the interior of the cup and the decorated exterior. The cup is a standard cylindrical demitasse with a simple looped handle at the right, made of white porcelain. The exterior of both cup and saucer are decorated with a classic Iznik-style floral pattern: light cobalt blue (#5080c0) hyacinths and scrolling leaves, red carnations (#c02020), green stems, and a fine blue geometric border ring all on a white glaze ground. The cup is filled nearly to the rim with dark Turkish coffee topped by a dense, slightly uneven tan-brown foam with fine dark bubble clusters. The saucer is a standard round shape, tilted slightly toward the viewer in perspective. The cup-and-saucer assembly occupies approximately 70% of the frame, sitting center to slightly right, with the top of the cup at upper-center and the saucer base at lower-center. White space fills the upper-left corner and left margin generously.

composition.white_space: upper-left 25% empty, moderate left margin, minimal right and bottom margins

The three-quarter perspective gives it more dimensionality and warmth than the top-down version, making it ideal for a student lifestyle narrative. Pair with a brief text note about Turkish coffee culture or a price callout. Can be stacked with turk-kahvesi-1 in a split-layout showing 'two ways to experience Istanbul's coffee culture'.

images.design_notes: The white porcelain cup body will be nearly invisible against white section backgrounds always composite over a colored or dark background. Apply mix-blend-mode: multiply to drop the background white cleanly; however, test carefully as the white porcelain itself may also partially disappear on very dark backgrounds, requiring a subtle drop-shadow (box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)) to maintain the cup's visible silhouette. The coffee foam surface is detailed and photorealistic do not reduce below 150px rendered width or the texture will compress unattractively.

global_asset_rules.background_type: ALL images in this project set have white/transparent backgrounds they are CUT-OUT compositing assets, NOT full-bleed photography
global_asset_rules.critical_constraint: NEVER place these images on white or very light background sections the subjects will become invisible or lose impact
recommended_backgrounds: ESN Dark Blue (#2e3192) for Pride/historical scenes
Dark overlay on video for Hero
Warm cream or dark brown for food/coffee assets
global_asset_rules.compositing_technique: Use CSS mix-blend-mode: multiply on white backgrounds to make white transparent in browsers that support it though actual transparent WebP is preferable

animation_global.max_duration: 1s for UI animations, 8-12s for ambient loops (ferry, seagull drift)
animation_global.easing: ease-out for entry animations, ease-in-out for loops
animation_global.reduced_motion: All animations must check prefers-reduced-motion fallback to opacity fade only
